pages.name: Home
pages.description: Main entry point providing overview of solar services and direct access to core tools. Highlights key value propositions and routes users into quoting, consultation, savings, packages, installers, financing, and resources.
primary_functions: Introduce the company’s solar installation services and key value propositions
Provide prominent calls-to-action to Get a Quote, Schedule Consultation, Savings Calculator, and key tools
Route users quickly to Solar Packages, Find Installers, Financing, System Builder, and Blog

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click primary "Get a Quote" call-to-action in hero or header
Click "Schedule Consultation" call-to-action in hero or header
Click "See Your Savings" or similar savings-focused call-to-action
Click "Browse Solar Packages" from homepage sections
Click "Design Your System" from homepage tools section
Click "Find Installers" from homepage tools section
Click "Explore Financing" from financing teaser section
Click any "View all resources" or blog teaser links

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry labeled "Home"
Accessed by visiting the root URL or index.html directly

pages.name: Get a Quote
pages.description: Initial quote form to estimate system size and pricing based on home details. This is the starting point for generating QuoteRequests and associated QuotePlans.
primary_functions: Collect basic property and usage data (ZIP, property type, roof area, electric bill)
Allow users to select a desired system size (e.g., 5 kW) from a dropdown
Submit inputs to generate plan estimates and navigate to the Quote Results page

incoming_params.description: Optional ZIP code to prefill in the quote form when coming from other tools.
Optional property type (e.g., 'residential', 'commercial') to preselect in the quote form.
Optional roof area in square feet to prefill, if deep-linked from other content or campaigns.
Optional average monthly electric bill used to prefill the bill field.
Optional desired system size in kW to preselect (e.g., from Savings Calculator or a package).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Calculate quote" / "See estimate" after completing the quote form, which calls createQuoteRequestAndGeneratePlans and navigates to results.

access_methods.description: Accessible via "Get a Quote" in the main header navigation
Users can navigate directly to get_quote.html
Optional URL parameters prefill the form when deep-linked from other flows
Submitting this form transitions the user to Quote Results

pages.name: Quote Results
pages.description: List of estimated solar plans based on quote inputs, with sorting and selection. Displays QuotePlans generated for a specific QuoteRequest and lets users drill into plan details.
primary_functions: Display available solar plans with key metrics (system size, total price, estimated monthly payment)
Allow sorting of plans by criteria such as monthly payment low to high
Let users click a plan to view its detailed quote on the Quote Detail page

incoming_params.description: ID of the QuoteRequest whose generated QuotePlans should be displayed and sorted.
Optional sort key (e.g., 'monthly_payment', 'total_price') to initialize sorting.
Optional sort direction (e.g., 'asc' or 'desc') for the plans list.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a plan card in the results list to open full quote details.

access_methods.description: Accessed with a quoteRequestId parameter after submitting the Get a Quote form or returning from Quote Detail

pages.name: Quote Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific quote or plan, including pricing and savings summary. Supports saving the quote and routing to related actions such as consultation and financing.
primary_functions: Show full details of a selected quote (pricing, monthly payment, equipment, term assumptions)
Allow users to save the quote to their quote list or local storage for later reference
Provide options to print, download, or proceed to consultation or financing from this quote

incoming_params.description: ID of the QuotePlan whose details should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Schedule consultation" from the quote to book time based on this quote.
Click "Explore financing for this quote" to start financing comparison prefilled with this plan’s cost.

access_methods.description: Accessed via links that include quotePlanId in the URL from Quote Results, Solar Packages, or System Summary

pages.name: Solar Packages
pages.description: Catalog of predefined solar packages with filters for residential systems and size. Supports filtering by system characteristics and opening detailed package views.
primary_functions: Display a list of solar system packages with system size, price, and warranty highlights
Provide filters for system type (e.g., Residential), system size range (min/max kW), and other attributes
Allow sorting by total price low to high and let users open package details in new tabs

incoming_params.description: Optional system type filter (e.g., 'residential', 'commercial') to pre-apply.
Optional minimum system size in kW for pre-filtering (e.g., 6).
Optional maximum system size in kW for pre-filtering (e.g., 8).
Optional initial sort option (e.g., 'total_price_asc').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a package card or open in a new tab to see full package details.

access_methods.description: Accessible via "Solar Packages" in the main navigation
Accessible via "Solar Packages" link in the footer
Filter and sort state can be initialized via query parameters

pages.name: Package Detail
pages.description: Detailed information page for a specific solar package. Shows full pricing, components, and warranty info, and allows adding the package to the user’s quote list.
primary_functions: Present full package details including components, total price, and panel warranty duration
Highlight whether the package meets typical criteria (e.g., 6–8 kW range, under $15,000, 20+ year warranty)
Let users request the package or add it to their quote by clicking an 'Add to quote' or 'Request this package' button

incoming_params.description: ID of the SolarPackage to display in detail.

outgoing_connections.trigger: After clicking "Add to quote" and successfully calling addPackageToQuoteList, optionally navigate to the generated quote plan detail.

access_methods.description: Accessed with a packageId parameter from Solar Packages listing or featured links

pages.name: Consultation Booking
pages.description: Scheduler for virtual or in-person solar consultations. Allows users to select consultation type, location, available date/time, and submit an appointment request.
primary_functions: Let users choose consultation type (e.g., Virtual / Video call) and enter location details (ZIP, property type)
Provide a calendar and time-slot picker to select the earliest available weekday appointment at 10:00 AM
Collect contact information and submit a consultation booking or appointment request

incoming_params.description: Optional ZIP code to prefill the location section for the consultation.
Optional property type to preselect (e.g., 'residential').
Optional consultation type to preselect (e.g., 'virtual').
Optional tracking source indicating where the booking was initiated (e.g., 'quote_detail').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Optional "Back to Home" or "Done" button after successful booking confirmation.

access_methods.description: Accessible via "Schedule Consultation" in the header navigation
Accessible via "Schedule Consultation" in the footer
Consultation type and ZIP can be prefilled via URL parameters
Submitting the booking form calls bookConsultationAppointment

pages.name: Blog / Resources
pages.description: Resource center listing blog posts and articles about solar, incentives, and tax credits. Supports searching and filtering, then navigating into full article pages.
primary_functions: List articles with titles, summaries, dates, and key topics
Provide search (e.g., for 'federal solar tax credit') and filters, including date range (Last 12 months)
Allow sorting by recency (most recent / newest first) and navigation to individual article pages

incoming_params.description: Optional search query to initialize the article search box.
Optional date range filter (e.g., 'last_12_months').
Optional category filter to focus on topics like incentives or policy.
Optional sort option (e.g., 'published_at_desc' for newest first).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an article title or card in the blog list.

access_methods.description: Accessible via "Resources" link pointing to the blog list
Accessible via "Blog & Resources" link in the footer
Search and filter state can be initialized via query parameters

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Full content view for a specific article or blog post. Allows saving to a reading list with tags and shows related content.
primary_functions: Display the article’s full text, images, and publication date
Allow users to save or bookmark the article and add tags or labels such as 'Incentives 2024'
Provide sharing options and navigation to related or recent articles

incoming_params.description: ID of the Article to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a link such as "Back to all articles" or a category tag.

access_methods.description: Accessed from Blog / Resources or homepage featured articles with articleId in the URL
Can be shared externally via its URL with articleId (or slug) parameter

pages.name: Savings Calculator
pages.description: Interactive tool to estimate energy and cost savings for different system sizes and site conditions. Supports iterating on system size and saving scenarios for later comparison.
primary_functions: Collect inputs such as ZIP code, monthly electric bill, roof orientation, shading level, and system size
Calculate and display estimated energy production and annual savings for the chosen system size
Allow users to adjust system size (e.g., in 1 kW increments) until annual savings reach a target (e.g., $1,500+)
Enable users to save a configuration as a named scenario (e.g., 'Target $1500+ savings') and show a simple list of saved scenarios on the same page

incoming_params.description: Optional ZIP code to prefill the calculator.
Optional average monthly bill to prefill in dollars.
Optional starting system size for the slider/input.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Get a quote for this system" call-to-action after running the savings estimate.

access_methods.description: Accessible via "Savings Calculator" in the main navigation
Users can access the calculator directly via savings_calculator.html
Initial calculator values can be passed via query parameters

pages.name: Installers Search
pages.description: Search and discovery page for local solar installers based on ZIP, distance, rating, and reviews. Enables filtering and sorting to identify top-rated installers.
primary_functions: Let users enter a ZIP code and set a search radius (e.g., within 25 miles)
Filter installer results by rating (e.g., 4.5 stars & up) and minimum number of reviews (e.g., 50+)
Allow sorting by rating high to low and provide clickable installer cards that open the Installer Profile page

incoming_params.description: Optional ZIP code to prefill the installer search.
Optional search radius in miles to preselect.
Optional minimum rating threshold to pre-apply.
Optional minimum review count to pre-apply.
Optional sort key (e.g., 'rating_desc').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an installer card to open detailed installer profile.

access_methods.description: Accessible via "Find Installers" in the main navigation
Accessible via "Find Installers" link in the footer
Search criteria can be initialized via URL parameters

pages.name: Installer Profile
pages.description: Detail page for an individual installer, showing ratings, reviews, and contact options. Allows users to send a project inquiry to the installer.
primary_functions: Display installer details, including name, service area, ratings, review counts, and certifications
Show customer reviews and key stats that support selection of a top-rated installer
Provide a 'Contact this installer' or 'Request a quote' form to send a message with project details (e.g., interest in a 7 kW system)

incoming_params.description: ID of the Installer whose profile should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Optional link "Schedule consultation" from installer profile.

access_methods.description: Accessed with installerId from the Installers Search results

pages.name: System Builder
pages.description: Step-by-step configuration tool for designing a custom solar system. Guides users through roof details, panel selection, battery storage, and inverter type before reviewing the design.
primary_functions: Guide users through selecting system type (e.g., Residential) and roof details (roof type, pitch)
Enable selection of panel models (e.g., 400W) and quantity (e.g., 16 panels)
Allow users to include battery storage and select a battery capacity of at least 10 kWh
Provide inverter type selection (e.g., String inverter) and proceed to a summary step

incoming_params.description: Optional existing SystemDesign ID to load and edit a previously created design.
Optional system type (e.g., 'residential') to preselect when starting the builder.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "View system summary" / "Review design" after completing the builder steps.

access_methods.description: Accessible via "Design Your System" in the main navigation
Users can access the builder directly via system_builder.html
Existing designId can be passed to edit a saved design

pages.name: System Summary
pages.description: Summary of the configured system from the System Builder, with key specs and next steps. Presents derived capacity, performance, and allows saving as a quote.
primary_functions: Display an overview of the designed system (panel count and wattage, total kW, battery capacity, inverter type)
Highlight estimated performance, savings, and high-level pricing if available
Offer options to save the design, export or download a summary, and request a quote or consultation based on the design

incoming_params.description: ID of the SystemDesign to summarize.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Save as quote" which calls saveSystemDesignAsQuote and then navigates to the generated Quote Detail.
Click "Edit design" to go back into the System Builder with the same design.
Click "Schedule consultation" from the system summary.

access_methods.description: Accessed with designId parameter from System Builder

pages.name: Financing Overview & Comparison
pages.description: Information and comparison tool for solar financing and payment options. Explains financing types and lets users generate and filter financing offers for a given project cost.
primary_functions: Explain available financing types (loans, leases, PPAs) and key terms in simple language
Provide a project information form to input project cost, ZIP code, and credit score range to generate offers
Display financing options with filters for maximum upfront payment and maximum monthly payment
Allow sorting by APR low to high and opening an option’s details (e.g., in an on-page panel or modal)
Provide an inline application form for a selected financing option where users can enter loan amount and term length and save a pre-application to finish later

incoming_params.description: Optional project cost to prefill the financing comparison (e.g., from a quote or system design).
Optional ZIP code to prefill when coming from a quote.
Optional credit score band to preselect in the financing form (e.g., '680_719').
Optional FinancingComparison ID to resume viewing and filtering a previous comparison.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Optional "Talk to an expert" or "Schedule consultation" call-to-action from financing page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via "Financing" in the main navigation
Accessible via "Financing Options" in the footer
Project cost and comparison state can be initialized via query parameters

pages.name: About Us
pages.description: Background information about the solar company, team, and mission. Builds trust by showcasing experience, credentials, and service areas with clear next steps.
primary_functions: Communicate the company’s history, mission, and expertise in solar installations
Show credentials, partnerships, and service areas to build trust
Provide links to key actions such as scheduling a consultation or getting a quote

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Schedule a consultation" from About Us page.
Click "Get a quote" from About Us page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via "About Us" link in the footer
Accessible directly via about.html

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: General contact page for customer inquiries and support. Provides contact details and a form for questions not handled by specialized flows.
primary_functions: Provide a general contact form for questions not covered by other specialized forms
Display contact information such as phone number, email, and office address
Offer quick links to support resources and FAQs if relevant

incoming_params.description: Optional topic to preselect in the contact form (e.g., 'billing', 'technical support').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Optional "Back to Home" link after submitting a contact request.

access_methods.description: Accessible via "Contact" link in the footer
Accessible directly via contact.html

pages.name: Legal & Privacy
pages.description: Combined page for privacy policy, terms of use, and other legal information. Includes disclosures related to financing offers and installer listings.
primary_functions: Present the website’s privacy policy, including data handling for quotes, bookings, and saved items
Outline terms of use for the website, tools, and content
Provide any required disclosures for financing information and installer listings

access_methods.description: Accessible via "Legal & Privacy" link in the footer
Accessible directly via legal.html

header_links.description: Homepage with overview and main calls-to-action
Start a residential or commercial solar quote
Browse predefined solar system packages and pricing
Estimate your solar savings and payback
Configure a custom solar and storage system
Search for local solar installers near your ZIP code
Explore financing and payment options for solar
Read articles, guides, and updates on solar and incentives
Book a virtual or in-person solar consultation

footer_links.description: Learn about the company and its mission
Get in touch for general questions and support
View residential and commercial solar packages
Locate top-rated installers in your area
Review financing solutions and compare offers
Book a consultation for your project
View privacy policy, terms of use, and legal notices
